description: Equip Avatar is a ProtoFlux node that allows for making a User Equip an Avatar. A bit of caution should be used when using this node, since making people equip an avatar against their will without proper forewarning can be considered distasteful at best.

fields.* ([[Impulses|Call]]): Call this to make the provided User (User) equip the provided AvatarRoot (Slot).
fields.User: The user that should equip the provided AvatarRoot (Slot).
fields.AvatarRoot: The Avatar the provided User (User) should equip. This slot is usually where the AvatarRoot component would be on an avatar which usually resides with the VRIK.
fields.DestroyOld: Whether the avatar the user was previously wearing should be destroyed. Only use this when nessary, because the avatar will be gone forever from the world when deleted.
fields.Next: Sends an impulse after * (Call) was called and the provided User (User) has equipped the provided AvatarRoot (Slot).
